title: Cast Iron Fire Bucket 39 Centimetre Rusted Wood Log Holder Basket Fireplace Carrier Store
features: Cast Iron bucket for firewood. Thanks to the handle, you can comfortably lift and carry wood in it.
The rusted design makes it look great in any interior.
It can be used for storing logs or just as a decorative feature
The bucket is made from cast iron, which guarantees durability for many years.
description: Introducing the Fire Bucket Add a touch of warmth and ambiance to your outdoor space with our Fire Bucket featuring a rustic metal finish. Key Features: Rustic Metal Finish: Charming rusty appearance for a vintage and weathered look. Generous Size: Diameter of 365mm and height of 39cm for a longer burning time and larger logs. Sturdy Construction: Durable metal with 15 flat ribs for added strength and support. Convenient Handle: Sturdy handle measuring 66cm for easy transportation and positioning. Heat-Resisting Coating: Can withstand temperatures up to 800 degrees Celsius for longevity and peace of mind. Product Specifications: Diameter: 365mm Height: 39cm Bottom Diameter: 265mm Flat Ribs: 15 with 3cm thickness Weight: 1.5kg Handle Length: 66cm Heat-Resisting Coating: Up to 800 degrees Celsius Create a cozy and warm atmosphere in your garden with the Fire Bucket. Its rustic metal finish and generous size make it a perfect addition to your outdoor space. Enjoy relaxing evenings around the crackling fire, whether you're entertaining guests or simply unwinding after a long day. The sturdy construction and convenient handle ensure a safe and controlled fire experience. Don't miss out on the opportunity to enhance your terrace or garden with this beautiful fire bucket. Bring warmth and atmosphere to your outdoor gatherings and create lasting memories around the crackling fire.
